THE GATHERING SPOT
the premier
Private-Membership club deeply rooted in community & culture
Our club is more than just a place to socialise. It’s a home away from home, where you can relax, unwind, and be yourself. Our friendly staff is always on hand to cater to your needs and ensure that you have a truly exceptional experience every time you visit.

--- Page: /about ---
About – The Gathering Spot
Skip to content
ABOUT
US
THE VISION OF OUR FOUNDERS
THE VISION HAS ALWAYS BEEN ABOUT COMMUNITY AND NOT SPACE.
The concept for The Gathering Spot was born in Washington, DC, while Ryan attended Georgetown Law School and TK worked as a Portfolio Manager at Fannie Mae. Since the beginning, it has always been our mission to bring people together.
IT’S ABOUT COMMUNITY
WE PROVIDE BEAUTIFUL, WELL-DESIGNED SPACES, BUT OUR CLUB IS ABOUT MORE THAN JUST THAT
This shift reflects our commitment to intentionally curating a diverse collection of entrepreneurs, creatives, executives, filmmakers, politicians, venture capitalists, lawyers, musicians, and artists under one roof.
Each club includes a full restaurant & bar, co-working space, and event space.
Request Membership
